title: Capacity-matched comparison before and after scenario correction

nature_skill.name: nature-figure
nature_skill.contract: quantitative grid; SVG/PDF/PNG; editable SVG/PDF text; source CSV traceability

core_conclusion: The scenario-label fix changed the primary LOTO delta Spearman from -0.110 to +0.137; both intervals cross zero.
target_output: offline reader report and publication-editable static figure exports

evidence_hierarchy.controls_or_boundary: The corrected favorable direction is nonsignificant and not a validation result.

statistics_notes: Bars are effect estimates; error bars are bootstrap 95% CIs from the source tables.
image_integrity_notes: No raster scientific image manipulation; all charts are generated from corrected tabular sources.
reviewer_risk: The corrected favorable direction is nonsignificant and not a validation result.
